title: Cos-warshipgirl
description: CreateBigConnon heavy weapon held by the player — used to extend the player’s ranged firepower when CBC is present, in a lightweight manner.
body:
This is CreateBigConnon `s affiliated CBC More Shells`s affiliated

Ideal for PvP servers running CBC or the TAOV modpack. It significantly bolsters a solo player's anti-vehicle capabilities without adding any hardware overhead. It is also perfectly suited for high-intensity naval combat—in fact, that was its primary design goal.

If you’re hesitant to install a bloated, standalone firearms mod just for a few guns or recoilless rifles, this is the streamlined solution you’ve been looking for.

Added some handheld launcher compatible with all current emitter types, along with armor that reduces water drag—enabling players to more easily engage other players or TAOV-Core NPCs while on water.

We have created player-held variants of all current emitters from both CBC and CBC More Shell. This allows PvP servers already using CBC to lightly incorporate ranged firearms or man-portable artillery—leveraging CBC’s existing mechanics—without introducing additional, bulky systems. It also serves as a direct enhancement to the player themselves. We intentionally designed this system to enable players to engage each other in naval combat, and to significantly strengthen their ability to fight vehicle-based NPCs within the TAOV modpack.

玩家手持的CBC重火力 用于轻量拓展有CBC时的玩家远程火力

特别适合已经安装了 CBC 的 PVP 服务器或TAOV整合包 它在不增加硬件负担的前提下 极大地增强了玩家单人对抗载具的能力  同样适合玩家在水上重火力对抗(或者说本就是为了这个)
若不想为了几把枪或火箭筒/无后坐力炮就加一个庞大的枪械模组可以试试这个

添加了覆盖目前所有的发射器类型的手持发射器 以及减小水上阻力的盔甲 用于玩家在水上方便对抗玩家或者TAOV-Core的NPC
我们对当前在CBC与CBC More Shell的所有发射器制作了玩家手持的变种 这可以让本身拥有CBC的pvp服务器使用cbc的机制去轻量的体现远程枪械或单兵火炮 而不用添加其他庞大的体系 也同时是对玩家自身的一种强化 我们有计划的让玩家通过这套体系去互相海上对抗 或者是在TAOV整合包中有着更强的自身对抗载具NPC的能力
谢谢长矛长 谢谢所有长矛长
